title: [CODEREVIEW-7] Kconfig PoE
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/Kconfig.defconfig:8 - LICHEN_POE Kconfig option added but no corresponding implementation in power subsys or drivers. Needs Kconfig dependency on regulator or ADC.
close_reason: Added LICHEN_HAS_POE to hal/Kconfig with proper deps; fixed t_deck Kconfig selects for LVGL/DISPLAY/ST7789V/INPUT/GPIO_KEYS; updated build-t1000e.sh to source env.sh removing hardcoded paths. 3 codereview passes complete (Kconfig style, deps, build gate). Gates: build-t1000e + west passed.
